default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize next steps for the GrowthX \<\> Coralogix partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Coralogix's Goal:** Increase content volume and technical depth to build authority and add personality via DevRel.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Method:** Uses complex AI workflows (e.g., fact-checking agents) and human editors to produce high-quality content at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Client Collaboration:** GrowthX manages the full content lifecycle, with Coralogix providing input on strategy, topic prioritization, and final review for high-risk pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=966.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Coralogix will internalize the process and schedule a follow-up call for Friday or Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)

## Topics

### Coralogix's Content Goals

  - [**Problem:** Coralogix's \~1,100 pages are not technical enough, and the brand voice is too corporate.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Increase content volume and technical depth.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
      - [Add personality and a human face via DevRel content.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Improve SEO for existing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Engine

  - [**Core Function:** An AI engine with human editors that accelerates content creation and learning.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
    1.  [**Context Engineering:** GrowthX builds a detailed "artifact" (company, persona, product info) to guide all content.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=453.0)
    2.  [**Workflow Execution:** Complex AI pipelines handle research, fact-checking, and enrichment.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
    3.  [**Human Oversight:** A team of 30+ editors provides judgment, ensuring quality and brand alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1523.0)

### Client Collaboration Model

  - [**Input Points:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [**Artifacts:** Coralogix reviews the artifact to ensure accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
      - [**Topics:** Coralogix helps prioritize from a map of thousands of opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)
      - [**Calibration:** Coralogix reviews initial content samples to set the quality bar.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)
  - [**Review Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
      - [**Low-Risk Content:** GrowthX publishes directly.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1090.0)
      - [**High-Risk Content:** Coralogix's SMEs provide final review.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This model frees Coralogix from managing the content lifecycle (e.g., updating 1,100 pages) to focus on providing product insight.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)

### Case Study: Augment Code

  - [**Context:** A highly competitive space (vs. Cursor, Copilot).](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**New Content Sections:** Created `/guides`, `/learn`, and `/tools` to capture non-branded search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=705.0)
      - [**High-Intent Topics:** Focused on head-to-head comparisons (e.g., "Herbster vs. Copilot").](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Outcome:** GrowthX-generated content drove 3-4x more traffic than the client's entire original blog.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Coralogix Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
      - [Internalize the GrowthX process.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up call with Tyler for Friday or Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [**Tyler Pavlas:**](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
      - [Remain available for 1-on-1 deep-dive calls.](https://fathom.video/share/sSiyzEFzFAWThNw-qfbsD3xpFJGkExJb?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)

action_items.description: Draft GrowthX plan for Coralogix (scope, timing, review gates); then schedule Fri/Mon check-in w/ Tyler
